description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay. Define a single deploy stage and two jobs: development and stable. The development job runs only on the master branch, executes the before_script to log in to the registry with gitlab-ci-token, then builds the image with tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest and pushes it. The stable job runs only on tag pushes, also uses the before_script login, builds the image with tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(CI_BUILD_REF_NAME) and pushes it. Both jobs are assigned to the deploy stage.
